User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account schema including custom billing subscription details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

emailVerificationToken.description: Token utilized for dispatching verification links.

passwordResetToken.description: Token utilized for account password resets.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating last profile alteration date.

plan.description: The current billing subscription plan of the user.

planExpiresAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the user plan expires.

Payment.title: FamPay Payment
Payment.description: Transaction and manual UTR billing records for premium subscription purchase verification.

Project.title: System Project
Project.description: Metadata for designed multi-agent system workflows.

ProjectOutput.title: Multi-Agent System Schematic Output
ProjectOutput.description: Detailed multi-agent system schematic specifications and flow configurations.

output_data.description: Stringified JSON object representing MultiAgentSystem definition schema.

Workspace.title: Collaborative Team Workspace
Workspace.description: Workspaces where owners can share multi-agent systems with collaborators.

AuditLog.title: Workspace Activity Audit Trail
AuditLog.description: System-generated cryptographic history of collaborative actions inside workspaces.

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles with secure encrypted hashes.

fampay_payments/{paymentId}.description: Stores fampay UPI subscription purchase receipts.

projects/{projectId}.description: Stores projects metadata and organization assignments.

workspace_audit_logs/{logId}.description: Stores tamper-proof history of multi-agent changes.
